creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Warner Losh from comment #3)
I was searching for the cause of "failed to add font" on a 14.2Stable that I built this week, using BIOS startup.  I note that gzip is built into loader (libsa) and it works correctly, ie fonts are loaded :)

Aside: I'm booting from one device and rerooting to a different device. When I place the fonts/ folder under /boot/, the system boots without error messages.
